title: oscore: compute_nonce() layout comment is correct but hard to verify
description: In lib.rs:555-593, compute_nonce() has a detailed ASCII-art comment showing the 13-byte nonce layout. However, the code uses magic indices (0, 8-sender_id.len(), NONCE_LEN-piv.len()) that require mental math to verify against the diagram. Consider using named constants like SENDER_ID_END=8, PIV_START=8.
